topic: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional

sections.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Second: If + past simple, would + base verb (unreal present/future) | Third: If + past perfect, would have + V3 (unreal past). Rules: Second conditional talks about imaginary/hypothetical present or future situations | Third conditional talks about imaginary past situations that did not actually happen — often regret | Use 'were' instead of 'was' in formal second conditional (If I were you...) | Never use 'would' inside the if-clause
sections.formula: Second: If + past simple, would + base verb (unreal present/future) | Third: If + past perfect, would have + V3 (unreal past)

examples.hindi: अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह घर खरीदता।
examples.english: If I had money, I would buy this house.

examples.hindi: अगर मैं तुम होता, तो मैं यह नहीं करता।
examples.english: If I were you, I would not do this.

examples.hindi: अगर उसे पता होता, तो वह आती।
examples.english: If she knew, she would come.

examples.hindi: अगर मुझे समय मिलता, तो मैं travel करता।
examples.english: If I had time, I would travel.

examples.hindi: अगर मैंने मेहनत की होती, तो मैं पास हो जाता।
examples.english: If I had worked hard, I would have passed.

examples.hindi: अगर तुमने मुझे बताया होता, तो मैं मदद करता।
examples.english: If you had told me, I would have helped.

sections.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Second: If + past simple, would + base verb (unreal present/future) | Third: If + past perfect, would have + V3 (unreal past)

examples.hindi: अगर वह जल्दी आया होता, तो हम मिल पाते।
examples.english: If he had come early, we would have met.

examples.hindi: अगर मुझे गलती पता होती, तो मैं इसे सुधार देता।
examples.english: If I had known the mistake, I would have corrected it.

examples.hindi: अगर मौसम अच्छा होता, तो हम बाहर जाते।
examples.english: If the weather were good, we would go out.

examples.hindi: अगर उसने मुझसे पूछा होता, तो मैं बता देता।
examples.english: If he had asked me, I would have told him.

examples.hindi: अगर मेरे पास कार होती, तो मैं रोज ऑफिस जाता।
examples.english: If I had a car, I would go to office every day.

examples.hindi: अगर हमने पहले शुरू किया होता, तो हम खत्म कर लेते।
examples.english: If we had started earlier, we would have finished.

sections.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Second: If + past simple, would + base verb (unreal present/future) | Third: If + past perfect, would have + V3 (unreal past)

examples.hindi: अगर तुम खुश होते, तो मैं भी खुश होता।
examples.english: If you were happy, I would be happy too.

examples.hindi: अगर उसने ध्यान दिया होता, तो यह गलती नहीं होती।
examples.english: If he had paid attention, this mistake would not have happened.

examples.hindi: अगर मैं pilot होता, तो मैं दुनिया घूमता।
examples.english: If I were a pilot, I would travel the world.

examples.hindi: अगर उसने मुझे फोन किया होता, तो मैं आ जाता।
examples.english: If he had called me, I would have come.

sections.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Second: If + past simple, would + base verb (unreal present/future) | Third: If + past perfect, would have + V3 (unreal past)

examples.hindi: अगर तुम मेरी जगह होते, तो क्या करते?
examples.english: If you were in my place, what would you do?

examples.hindi: अगर मुझे यह मौका पहले मिला होता, तो मैं ले लेता।
examples.english: If I had gotten this chance earlier, I would have taken it.

examples.hindi: अगर वह ईमानदार होता, तो मैं उस पर भरोसा करता।
examples.english: If he were honest, I would trust him.

examples.hindi: अगर हमने योजना बनाई होती, तो यह समस्या न होती।
examples.english: If we had planned, this problem would not have happened.
